====Pokémon====
=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|width=75
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Corviknight
|stage2=Corvisquire
|type1=Flying
|type2=Steel
|img=Hop Corvisquire Adventures.png
|img2=Hop Corviknight Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS06
|epname=Watch Out!! Strong Rivals
|desc={{p|Corviknight}} is Hop's first known Pokémon. As a {{p|Corvisquire}}, it was first used to help move a boulder blocking the way to [[Turffield]]. It later evolved into Corviknight after Hop trained on the [[Isle of Armor]].

Corviknight's only known move is {{m|Pluck}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|width=75
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Pincurchin
|dyna=yes
|type1=Electric
|img=Hop Pincurchin Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS11
|epname=Gulp!! Gulp Pokémon
|desc={{p|Pincurchin}} is Hop's second known Pokémon. It was first used to battle a wild {{p|Cramorant}}.

Pincurchin's known moves are {{m|Zing Zap}} and {{m|Spark}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Snorlax
|type1=Normal
|img=Hop Snorlax Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS11
|epname=Gulp!! Gulp Pokémon
|desc={{p|Snorlax}} is Hop's third known Pokémon. It was first used to help battle a wild {{p|Cramorant}}. It used its bulky body to catch Pokémon fired from Cramorant's {{a|Gulp Missile}}.

None of Snorlax's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Dubwool 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Dubwool
|stage1=Wooloo
|type1=Normal
|img=Hop Wooloo Adventures.png
|img2=Hop Dubwool Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS11
|epname=Gulp!! Gulp Pokémon
|desc={{p|Dubwool}} is Hop's fourth known Pokémon. It was first seen as a {{p|Wooloo}} as part of Hop's [[party]]. It was later revealed to have evolved into a Dubwool.

None of Dubwool's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Cramorant 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Cramorant
|type1=Water
|type2=Flying
|img=Hop Cramorant Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS10
|epname=Blazing!! Bede's Feelings
|desc={{p|Cramorant}} is Hop's fifth known Pokémon. Hop first encountered it at a swamp, where it attempted to eat [[Casey Shield|Casey]]'s {{p|Arrokuda}}, Kilo. With Casey's guidance, Hop freed Kilo, allowing him to catch Cramorant afterward.

None of Cramorant's moves are known and its Ability is {{a|Gulp Missile}}.}}

=====Traded away=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Marvin
|pkmn=Inteleon
|nick=Sniffler
|giga=yes
|type1=Water
|img=Marvin Sniffler.png
|img_size=120px
|img2=Marvin Sniffler Gigantamax.png
|img2_size=100px
|epnum=PASS01
|epname=Wow!! That's One Big Pokémon
|main=Sniffler
|desc={{p|Inteleon|Sniffler}} (Japanese: '''ナミダくん''' ''Namida-kun'') is a Pokémon belonging to [[Marvin]]. During the final battle with {{p|Eternatus}}, Sniffler was [[trade]]d to Hop so he could use its [[Gigantamax]] form since Marvin lacked a [[Dynamax Band]]. Together, it, [[Twiggy]], and [[Bit]] teamed up to defeat the three Gigantamax Pokémon guarding Eternatus. After Eternatus was defeated, Hop returned Sniffler to Marvin.}}

=====Given away=====
{{TrainerPoké
|width=75
|trainer=Hop
|pkmn=Legendary giants
|type1=???
|img=Galar Rivals Legendary titans Adventures.png
|epnum=PASS36
|epname=Rrmbll!! Serious Tower Battle
|desc=Hop, [[Bede]], and [[Marnie]] caught {{p|Regirock}}, {{p|Regice}}, and {{p|Registeel}} in the Crown Tundra while searching for the [[Rusted Sword]] and [[Rusted Shield]]. It was never specified who caught each giant, but they entrusted the three Pokémon to [[Peony]] so they could continue searching for the legendary gear.

None of their moves are known.}}
